title: Cauthon World Sweeper
description: deletes the items on the ground every user selected [seconds]
body:
## Features
1. Automatically cleans up dropped items at set intervals.
2. Provides countdown notifications before item removal (at 10 and 5 seconds).
3. Command to trigger manual item cleanup and reset the timer.
4. Configurable item cleaning interval.

## Commands
1. /cauthonsweep: This command allows you to manually trigger the item cleanup process. It will immediately remove all dropped items in the world and reset the timer for the next automatic sweep.

## Configuration
clean-interval: 300 as default, 300 seconds.

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
